mapper.sql:
WITH PARAM AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN 'DAY' ELSE 'MON' END AS GRP_UNIT, CASE WHEN #{fromDate} IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(#{fromDate}) > 0 AND #{fromDate} NOT IN ('null', 'undefined') THEN CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{fromDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TRUNC(TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{fromDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM') END END AS FR_DT, CASE WHEN #{toDate} IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(#{toDate}) > 0 AND #{toDate} NOT IN ('null', 'undefined') THEN CASE WHEN #{monthOrDay} = '20' THEN TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{toDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TRUNC(TO_DATE(REPLACE(#{toDate}, '-',''),'YYYYMMDD'), 'MM') END END AS TO_DT ), BASE AS ( SELECT B.OWKEY, B.CTKEY, B.SHIP_DT, CASE WHEN P.GRP_UNIT = 'MON' THEN TRUNC(B.SHIP_DT,'MM') ELSE B.SHIP_DT END AS SHIP_GRP_DT, B.OBHDKEY, B.OBDTKEY, B.ICKEY, B.ORD_QTY, B.NIS_QTY, P.GRP_UNIT FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN LENGTH(OH.OBREQDATE) = 14 THEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(OH.OBREQDATE,1,8),'YYYYMMDD') END AS SHIP_DT, OH.OBHDKEY, OH.OWKEY, OH.CTKEY, OD.OBDTKEY, OD.ICKEY, COALESCE(OD.EXPCTQTY, 0) AS ORD_QTY, COALESCE(OD.NISQTY, NISDT.NISQTY) AS NIS_QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OD ON OH.CTKEY = OD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = OD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = OD.OBHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_HD NISHD ON OH.CTKEY = NISHD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = NISHD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = NISHD.OBHDKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_NIS_DT NISDT ON NISHD.CTKEY = NISDT.CTKEY AND NISHD.OWKEY = NISDT.OWKEY AND NISHD.OBNISNO = NISDT.OBNISNO AND OD.OBDTKEY = NISDT.OBDTKEY ) B JOIN PARAM P ON 1=1 WHERE B.SHIP_DT IS NOT NULL AND (P.FR_DT IS NULL OR (CASE WHEN P.GRP_UNIT = 'MON' THEN TRUNC(B.SHIP_DT,'MM') ELSE B.SHIP_DT END) >= P.FR_DT) AND (P.TO_DT IS NULL OR (CASE WHEN P.GRP_UNIT = 'MON' THEN TRUNC(B.SHIP_DT,'MM') ELSE B.SHIP_DT END) <= P.TO_DT) ), AGG AS ( SELECT OWKEY, CTKEY, GRP_UNIT, SHIP_GRP_DT AS GRP_DT, COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY) AS ORD_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT OBHDKEY || '|' || OBDTKEY) AS ORD_SKU, SUM(ORD_QTY) AS ORD_EA, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NIS_QTY > 0 THEN OBHDKEY END) AS NIS_CNT, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN NIS_QTY > 0 THEN OBHDKEY || '|' || OBDTKEY END) AS NIS_SKU, SUM(NIS_QTY) AS NIS_EA FROM BASE GROUP BY OWKEY, CTKEY, GRP_UNIT, SHIP_GRP_DT ) SELECT TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'YYYY') AS grpyear, TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'MM') AS grpmonth, CASE WHEN GRP_UNIT='DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'DD') ELSE '-' END AS grpdate, CASE WHEN GRP_UNIT='DAY' THEN TO_CHAR(GRP_DT,'DY','NLS_DATE_LANGUAGE=KOREAN') ELSE '-' END AS weekday, ORD_CNT AS ordcnt, ORD_SKU AS ordsku, ORD_EA AS ordea, NIS_CNT AS niscnt, NIS_SKU AS nissku, NIS_EA AS nisea, CASE WHEN ORD_CNT = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NIS_CNT / ORD_CNT * 100, 2) END AS nisratecnt, CASE WHEN ORD_SKU = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NIS_SKU / ORD_SKU * 100, 2) END AS nisratesku, CASE WHEN ORD_EA = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(NIS_EA / ORD_EA * 100, 2) END AS nisrateea FROM AGG WHERE 1=1
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
